data.title: Fitts’s Law
data.description: Streamlines interactions by placing frequently used buttons within easy reach.
data.technical_spec: Consistent button placement and size across devices.

data.title: Hick’s Law
data.description: Simplifies decision-making by reducing choice complexity.
data.technical_spec: Minimalistic UI design to enhance decision-making processes.

data.title: Miller’s Law
data.description: Design accommodates the average user’s memory capacity.
data.technical_spec: Chunking of information to enhance memorability and accessibility.

data.title: Jakob’s Law
data.description: Leverages familiar design patterns to enhance user adaptability.
data.technical_spec: Consistent UI paradigms across similar apps to reduce learning curves.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Elevates perceived ease of use through visually pleasing interfaces.
data.technical_spec: Adaptable design systems with aesthetically pleasing color palettes.
